functional_audit.check: Coaching mode dropdown reads preferred mode and persists changes to profiles.onboarding_data (bTIVW / ai_coaching_mode_list_list_option_ai_coaching_mode_os)
Mode pill (ai_RNbBHXRN) shows user classification display per Bubble ElementParent.classification_option_classification_os binding
Quick action buttons navigate to /paths (plan) and /journal (reflect) with IR copy
Coaching note (ai_RNbBHXRO) shows pressure profile text when results exist

ui_evidence.notes: IR Group dashboard-greeting-text (parent of greeting-name + mode-badge) flattened; no marker on intermediate wrapper
IR Group dashboard-mode-badge missing; mode-pill and coaching-note are direct siblings under anonymous div, not children of ai_RNbBHXRM
Correctly binds classificationName per Bubble IR (not coaching mode label)
Marker present; uses bubbleStyle(Text_body_muted_) instead of IR style_ref Text_caption_
Static copy 'My coaching mode' matches Bubble
Copy 'Plan tomorrow' and Button_accent_ style_ref match IR
Copy 'Reflect on today' and Button_outline_ style_ref match IR

gaps: ui_refs ai_RNbBHXRK and ai_RNbBHXRM intermediate groups omitted — greeting-text and mode-badge nesting flattened
ai_RNbBHXRO uses Text_body_muted_ token instead of IR Text_caption_ style_ref

critiques.finding: Greeting card flattens IR hierarchy: ai_RNbBHXRK (dashboard-greeting-text) and ai_RNbBHXRM (dashboard-mode-badge) group wrappers have no data-bubble-id nodes; mode-pill and coaching-note sit in an anonymous flex column.
critiques.alternative: Add wrapper divs with data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXRK and ai_RNbBHXRM nesting ai_RNbBHXRL/ai_RNbBHXRN/ai_RNbBHXRO per ir/inventory.json parent_id chain.

critiques.finding: Coaching note (ai_RNbBHXRO) applies Text_body_muted_ instead of Bubble Text_caption_ style_ref.
critiques.alternative: Switch className to bubbleStyle('Text_caption_') on the coaching-note element.

critiques.finding: bTIVW empty-selection branch (bTIVe reset to simplifier) is unreachable because shadcn Select has no clear-to-empty path; non-duplicate add semantics differ slightly from Bubble add action.
critiques.alternative: Add explicit reset control or allow deselect if product requires full bTIVW parity.

critiques.finding: Coaching note reads results.pressure_profile while Bubble binds ElementParent.pressure_profile_text; fields are synced on calculate path but users without results fall back to placeholder instead of onboarding_data.pressure_profile_text.
critiques.alternative: Prefer onboarding_data.pressure_profile_text with results.pressure_profile fallback in useDashboardUser.
